mechanic._payout_note: Five-ring poker dice. Outer + inner rings all use the procedurally-generated poker card icons (tools/generate_poker_dice_icons.py): black wedge backgrounds painted by the rotor; portrait artwork composited into the J/Q/K/A wedges from poker_icons/jack.png + queen.png + king.png + acespades.png; rank letter + suit glyph rendered side-by-side at the top of each card in a proper font. Deck = 10 cards (10/J/Q/K/A × ♠/♥) — each ring is an independent draw, so 5 spins = a 5-card poker hand with replacement. Awards capped at 5x per the sub-flavour rules.
mechanic._rtp_note: Target RTP ~92% (house edge 8%). Distribution across 10⁵ = 100,000 ordered outcomes — five-of-a-kind 0.16% (jackpot 6x), royal-flush 0.24% (6x), four-of-a-kind 3.20% (5x), full-house 6.40% (4x), straight 3.60% (4x), three-of-a-kind 19.20% (2x), two-pair 28.80% (push), one-pair 38.40% (forfeit). Verified by PokerDiceResolverTests.
mechanic._ring_radial_weights_note: Outer ring at ~43% radial weight gives the big featured card; inner four rings each get ~14% so they read as small but clearly-suited cards.
mechanic._ring_shader_clips_note: Per-ring shader-clip override. Outer ring uses TRUE so the portrait artwork stretches to fill the wedge edges (full bleed) — accepting some aspect distortion in exchange for the visual weight of a complete card. Inner rings stay FALSE so the rank/suit glyphs render on a square plane and keep their aspect ratio (no stretching). Engine falls back to the shared icon_shader_clip flag for any ring whose entry is omitted.
mechanic._icons_note: Outer + inner ring icons both generated by tools/generate_poker_dice_icons.py using the same Georgia Bold (rank) + Segoe UI Symbol (suit) fonts. Outer set (poker_icons/outer/) bakes in portrait backdrops from jack.png/queen.png/king.png/acespades.png; inner set (poker_icons/inner/) skips the portrait but keeps the same rank+suit banner. Both sets ROTATE_180 so cards face OUTWARD on the wedge. Re-run the generator any time the fonts or portraits change.
mechanic._segment_order_note: Suited card names per segment. Same 10-card deck on every ring (5 ranks × ♠/♥). match_rank-aware patterns collapse the 'S_' / 'H_' prefix when counting; FlushPattern reads the prefix for royal-flush detection.
mechanic._suit_rank_note: Tie-break order if any pattern wants it — A high through 10.
mechanic._pattern_chain_note: Walk highest poker class first; first non-zero wins. match_rank: true strips the suit prefix so rank-based patterns count across suited rings. Flush requires all 5 same suit prefix — with this deck (only 10/J/Q/K/A available) any flush IS necessarily a royal flush.

payout_patterns._note: Royal flush — all 5 rings same suit (10-J-Q-K-A of one suit). 6x stake.
Five of a kind by rank. 6x stake.
Straight (mixed suits — royal flush already caught above). 4x stake.

mechanic._spin_timing_note: Staggered spin times — outer first, inner last — so the hand reveals card-by-card over ~3-5 seconds.
